CustomField.description: Address field for Container Service Users.
CustomField.formula: CONTAINER_Location_Street__c & BR() & If(NOT( ISBLANK(CONTAINER_Location_Street2__c )),CONTAINER_Location_Street2__c & BR() , '') + CONTAINER_Location_City__c +IF( (NOT( ISBLANK(CONTAINER_Location_City__c )) && NOT( ISBLANK(CONTAINER_Location_State__c ))), ', ' + CONTAINER_Location_State__c, CONTAINER_Location_State__c) + If (((NOT( ISBLANK(CONTAINER_Location_City__c )) || NOT( ISBLANK(CONTAINER_Location_State__c ))) && NOT( ISBLANK(Location_Zip_Postal_Code__c ))), ','+Location_Zip_Postal_Code__c,Location_Zip_Postal_Code__c) & BR() & CONTAINER_Location_Country__c
CustomField.label: Location Address
